title: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Credit Analyst in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
